response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed video content: 00:00-01:21 is a song performance, 01:21-04:35 is a talk segment.
2. Identified song title 'アイデンティティ' and artist 'Kanaria' from on-screen text and audio.
3. Search for 'アイデンティティ Kanaria lyrics' to retrieve official Japanese lyrics and their English translation.
4. Segmented video into two scenes based on the song performance and talk segment.
5. Constructed JSON response including metadata and lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a vocal performance of 'アイデンティティ' by VTuber Ouro Kronii, followed by a talk segment with a guest.

scenes.description: Ouro Kronii performs 'アイデンティティ' (Identity) by Kanaria.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
あ、ちょっと君に伝えたい
何かが有ったような
けったい真逆の踊るベール
サカサマだと知って
好意とは魅惑のプログラム
ただ差し詰めここから行き着くは愛

アイデンティティ　それは嗜好のアイデンティティ
アイデンティティ　唸れ君一人のせい
まだ捨てないで　待って　それは一つ二つのデスティニー
繋げでハッピー　落ちる流れ星と歪なあのに星
重なる面影に寄り添う　そっと君に寄り添う
弾け出す視界　胸に飛び込むハート
光るあなたのアイデンティティ

難義プライド　飛び込めデンジャラス
さっと羽ばたく強気な狂気と
そんで裏切り　お涙頂戴
乱舞ラララと足取りデンジャラス
背後隠れた二人にフォーカス
やっと見つけた不思議の正体

きっと恋とは真逆のプログラム
ただ差し詰めここから行き着くは
アイデンティティ　それは希望のアイデンティティ
アイデンティティ　唸れ君一人のせい
まだ捨てないで　待って　それは一つ二つのデスティニー
すぐさまハッピー　落ちる流れ星と歪なあのに星
重なる面影に寄り添う　そっと君に寄り添う
弾け出す視界　胸に飛び込むハート
刻むあなたのアイデンティティ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Ah, I have something I want to tell you
Something that feels like it happened
The bizarre, reverse-dancing veil
Knowing that it's upside down
Kindness is a seductive program
And in the end, what you reach from here is love.

Identity, that is the identity of preference
Identity, wail, it's all your fault alone
Don't throw it away yet, wait, that is one, two destinies
Connect and happy, falling shooting stars and that warped star
I cuddle up to the overlapping memories, I gently cuddle up to you
My field of vision bursts, a heart jumps into my chest
Your shining identity.

A difficult pride, jump into the dangerous
And with a strong madness, you flap your wings
And then you betray, beg for tears
Dance la la la and a dangerous gait
Focus on the two hidden behind
I finally found the identity of the mystery.

Surely, love is a reverse program
And in the end, what you reach from here is
Identity, that is the identity of hope
Identity, wail, it's all your fault alone
Don't throw it away yet, wait, that is one, two destinies
Immediately happy, falling shooting stars and that warped star
I cuddle up to the overlapping memories, I gently cuddle up to you
My field of vision bursts, a heart jumps into my chest
Engraving your identity.

scenes.description: Ouro Kronii talks with a guest plushie character, 'Wata-mama', and showcases birthday merchandise.
